# MathMind

> MathMind is an AI-powered maths tutor aligned to the Victorian Curriculum for Year 9, Year 10, and VCE (Year 11–12) students in Australia. Structured lessons, interactive quizzes, practice questions, and instant AI explanations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of MathMind, features, testimonials, and quick access to learning resources.
- [Learn](/learn): Browse the full curriculum by year level — Year 9, Year 10, Year 11 General, Year 11 Methods, Year 11 Specialist, Year 12 General, Year 12 Methods, and Year 12 Specialist.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Take topic-specific quizzes and category quizzes with instant feedback and mastery tracking.
- [Practice](/practice): Generate personalised practice sessions by topic, difficulty, and question count.
- [Community](/community): Ask and answer maths questions, share worked solutions, and discuss VCE mathematics topics.

## Optional

- [Year 9 Topics](/year/9): Number and Algebra, Measurement and Geometry, Statistics and Probability.
- [Year 10 Topics](/year/10): Number and Algebra, Measurement and Geometry, Statistics and Probability, 10A Extension.
- [Year 11 General](/year/11-general): VCE Unit 1/2 General Mathematics topics.
- [Year 11 Methods](/year/11-methods): VCE Unit 1/2 Mathematical Methods topics.
- [Year 11 Specialist](/year/11-specialist): VCE Unit 1/2 Specialist Mathematics topics.
- [Year 12 General](/year/12-general): VCE Unit 3/4 General Mathematics topics.
- [Year 12 Methods](/year/12-methods): VCE Unit 3/4 Mathematical Methods topics.
- [Year 12 Specialist](/year/12-specialist): VCE Unit 3/4 Specialist Mathematics topics.
